label: foot step (translate a foot to a new ground position)
signature: The named foot's ground position displaces by more than a step threshold while the other foot remains the support; detect via that foot's horizontal joint displacement plus a ground-contact change.

crosswalk.ewmn: displacement of the supporting/free limb base
crosswalk.laban: weight transfer; effort tuple binds at use

label: foot pivot (rotate the body about a fixed foot)
signature: The named foot stays in place (near-zero horizontal displacement) while root angular velocity about the vertical is non-zero over the window; the foot is the rotation center.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotation of the system about a fixed base point

label: center rotation (hips rotate about the vertical)
signature: Pelvis/root 6D orientation rotates about the vertical; root angular velocity about vertical exceeds threshold. The engine of tenkan and of most turning.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotatory movement of the central system about its vertical axis

label: center displacement (the center advances, withdraws, or moves offline)
signature: Root horizontal position displaces along the ma-ai axis (sagittal: enter/withdraw) or across it (lateral: offline), distinct from a single foot step; the center mass moves.

crosswalk.ewmn: translation of the central reference point

label: center level change (drop or rise of the center)
signature: Root vertical position decreases (drop) or increases (rise) while feet stay planted; detect via root height change with low horizontal displacement.

crosswalk.ewmn: vertical displacement of the central point

label: torso twist (shoulder line rotates relative to the hips)
signature: Shoulder-line orientation rotates about the vertical relative to the pelvis; detect via shoulder-hip separation angle changing over the window.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotation of the upper system relative to the lower

label: trunk flexion/extension (bow forward or back)
signature: Trunk inclination angle in the sagittal plane changes (forward flexion / backward extension); detect via the spine vector pitch relative to vertical.

crosswalk.ewmn: flexion at the trunk

label: trunk lateral inclination (side bend)
signature: Trunk inclination angle in the frontal (lateral) plane changes; detect via the spine vector roll relative to vertical.

crosswalk.ewmn: lateral flexion at the trunk

label: shoulder abduction/adduction (arm away from or toward the body)
signature: Humerus abduction angle (between the upper arm and the trunk's lateral axis) increases (open) or decreases (close); detect via the upper-arm vector relative to the trunk.

crosswalk.ewmn: change of latitude of the upper-arm unit

label: shoulder flexion/extension (arm forward-up or back)
signature: Humerus elevation in the sagittal plane changes; detect via the upper-arm vector pitch relative to the trunk.

crosswalk.ewmn: change of the upper-arm unit in the sagittal plane

label: shoulder internal/external rotation (humeral long-axis spin)
signature: The upper arm rotates about its own long axis (internal/external rotation); detect via the upper-arm segment 6D rotation about its longitudinal axis.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotatory movement of the upper-arm about its own axis

label: elbow flexion/extension (bend or straighten the arm)
signature: Elbow angle (upper-arm to forearm) decreases (flex) or increases (extend); detect from the joint angle over the window.

crosswalk.ewmn: flexion of the forearm unit at the elbow

label: knee flexion/extension (bend or straighten the leg)
signature: Knee angle (thigh to shank) decreases or increases; correlates with center level change; detect from the joint angle.

crosswalk.ewmn: flexion of the shank unit at the knee

label: forearm rotation (supinate / pronate / evert -- the hand-blade twist)
signature: The forearm/hand unit rotates about the forearm long axis; detect via forearm 6D rotation about its longitudinal axis with low forearm translation. This is the defining atom of kote-gaeshi (eversion) and kote-mawashi/nikyo.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotatory movement of the lower-arm/hand unit about its own axis

label: wrist flexion/extension (palmar / dorsal cocking)
signature: Hand pitch relative to the forearm changes (palmar flexion / dorsiflexion); detect via hand-segment orientation relative to the forearm.

crosswalk.ewmn: flexion of the hand unit at the wrist

label: wrist deviation (radial / ulnar)
signature: Hand yaw relative to the forearm changes (radial / ulnar deviation); detect via hand-segment lateral angle relative to the forearm.

crosswalk.ewmn: lateral movement of the hand unit at the wrist

label: hand path (the hand / contact point travels along a line)
signature: The wrist/hand joint follows a path; detect via hand velocity vector along the named axis exceeding threshold. Vertical descent is a tegatana cut; sagittal is a thrust/draw; spiral is a winding path.

crosswalk.ewmn: trajectory of the hand unit through the kinesphere

label: hand open/close (grip or release of a contact)
signature: The hand closes on or releases a target. Finger joints are often untracked, so detect indirectly via hand-to-target proximity plus matched relative velocity (the contact channel); this kineme typically triggers a coupling event in Tier 3.

crosswalk.ewmn: grasp (often outside the joint-angle system)

label: head turn (gaze / orientation about the vertical)
signature: Head 6D orientation rotates about the vertical relative to the trunk (gaze yaw); detect via head-segment yaw relative to the shoulder line.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotation of the head unit

label: whole-body displacement (entering or withdrawing as one)
signature: The whole body (root plus both feet) displaces along the ma-ai axis (enter/withdraw) or across it (offline), as a single committed motion rather than a single step; detect via center-of-mass horizontal displacement with both feet relocating.

crosswalk.ewmn: translation of the whole system

label: whole-body turn (the body turns as one about the vertical)
signature: The whole body reorients about the vertical (root and shoulder line together), usually about a pivot foot; detect via whole-body orientation change about vertical. The whole-body realization of tenkan.

crosswalk.ewmn: rotation of the whole system about a vertical axis

label: whole-body level change (the whole body lowers or rises)
signature: The whole body lowers (both knees flex, center drops) or rises; detect via center-of-mass height change with both feet planted.

crosswalk.ewmn: vertical displacement of the whole system
